<!-- GENERATED by scripts/build-skills.ts — do not edit by hand. Edit the token source or design-md/prose/skills/, then run `npm run build:skills`. -->

# Orbit colours

Canonical **CP/base** palette (Orbit is light-only). Reference via
`var(--orbit-color-<token>)` — never a raw hex. Orbit-mode overrides are in
`theme-orbit.md`.

## Semantic colours

Use these for anything meaningful. They alias the primitives below.

| Token | CSS variable | Value | Role |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `text-primary` | `var(--orbit-color-text-primary)` | #000000 | Text |
| `text-secondary` | `var(--orbit-color-text-secondary)` | #666666 | Text |
| `text-disabled` | `var(--orbit-color-text-disabled)` | #999999 | Text |
| `text-inverse` | `var(--orbit-color-text-inverse)` | #ffffff | Text |
| `text-error` | `var(--orbit-color-text-error)` | #e00034 | Text |
| `text-info` | `var(--orbit-color-text-info)` | #2a75b1 | Text |
| `text-success` | `var(--orbit-color-text-success)` | #009a81 | Text |
| `text-warning` | `var(--orbit-color-text-warning)` | #af7d00 | Text |
| `text-heading` | `var(--orbit-color-text-heading)` | #040921 | Text |
| `border-default` | `var(--orbit-color-border-default)` | #e6e6e6 | Border |
| `border-accent` | `var(--orbit-color-border-accent)` | #a2a9c5 | Border |
| `border-selected` | `var(--orbit-color-border-selected)` | #00bd9e | Border |
| `border-highlight` | `var(--orbit-color-border-highlight)` | #001969 | Border |
| `border-hover` | `var(--orbit-color-border-hover)` | #e6e6e6 | Border |
| `border-disabled` | `var(--orbit-color-border-disabled)` | #cccccc | Border |
| `border-focused` | `var(--orbit-color-border-focused)` | #00bd9e | Border |
| `border-error` | `var(--orbit-color-border-error)` | #e00034 | Border |
| `border-style1` | `var(--orbit-color-border-style1)` | #f0ab00 | Border |
| `bg-default` | `var(--orbit-color-bg-default)` | #ffffff | Background |
| `bg-accent` | `var(--orbit-color-bg-accent)` | #ffffff | Background |
| `bg-hover` | `var(--orbit-color-bg-hover)` | #f6f6f6 | Background |
| `bg-selected` | `var(--orbit-color-bg-selected)` | #dffcf3 | Background |
| `bg-disabled` | `var(--orbit-color-bg-disabled)` | #e6e6e6 | Background |
| `bg-style1` | `var(--orbit-color-bg-style1)` | #fffbf2 | Background |
| `bg-canvas` | `var(--orbit-color-bg-canvas)` | #f3f5f8 | Background |
| `bg-canvas-grid` | `var(--orbit-color-bg-canvas-grid)` | color-mix(in srgb, var(--orbit-color-swatch-slate-200) 64%, transparent) | Background |

## Primitive palette

The underlying ramp. Prefer a semantic token; use a primitive only when no semantic
token fits.

| --- | --- | --- |

| `white` | `var(--orbit-color-white)` | #ffffff |
